textByHash.0024add11328ecd865bb96daebc305621e8c3571: I need you to start checking nearby caves looking for our missing Petra. The caves are probably home to some creature or creatures. Check around the vicincity.
textByHash.0071ce544feb7c786a4a75319267b65fd818a43a: Unfortunately no, sorry, but if adventure is what you seek, try checking through your quest list!
textByHash.0afbde32310d0c4a0d90a1372710b13c53a57a16: Ok, ok, it's up on the roof...
textByHash.12b8d6d696e198eccf0ad1f608b66c2093a1bfdb: Hmm, somehow I knew you were going to ask me that...strange...life is so predictable when you have the power of foresight.
textByHash.15a576c4e9a89ffa190459fa5356db8b8c092dc5: Well, we believe it may be some sort of nearby cave, it can't be very far away as the impressions we get are quite strong. We believe the cave is a home for some sort of creature or creatures.
textByHash.1ae6e9f2858ddc4e65c5a788249140d13cb00f6d: It looks like she's ended up in a bit of a dead end position...
textByHash.22739d30d1a8deb25b4e28c2a84d729dfdec912a: Quite hard actually. I mean, you're still waiting for me to do it aren't you and I've told you time and again that I can't...right now...but that normally it's actually quite an easy thing for me to do.
textByHash.27d0ea3fd16daac0cc1080ab9f8feded070cc0a7: Oh, thanks so much...you can't believe how helpful it is to get accurate predictions on the weather...we Seers are almost blind without it.
textByHash.3197300794a267f6837575d2f6bee412f2f50477: It doesn't make sense to get angry about something so trivial.
textByHash.3210dc9297275e45505551b89c580f6d3af61421: Not exactly lazy...but unable. My abilities and concern have been focused on the fate of a local girl whose association with a certain wizard has landed her between a rock and hard place.
textByHash.40b63f2648aed30ab81af51252226dafd9157a0b: Well, it's just like that Ok, I just can't get a clear picture...and that's it.
textByHash.428c54bca1fa15bddbec6e495c5357e94f521689: Anyway, we need a special combination of items before we can truly have foreknowledge of the weather.
textByHash.4ed0d0b16b7f8f7db73515b1de139159c9590496: We sense that there are other beings around her, smelly creatures, and some sort of presence is watching over her.
textByHash.5ae44952355d191d3bb30b022a0c7de075fa502e: The impressions are coming from a south westerly direction. Don't go further east than you are already, no further south than Ardougne and no further west than the combat training camp.
textByHash.5ee2b1fc056ad7587aed3058a5818f377cc2ac9c: Well, nothing in fact, as I can't give you a weather report. I'm sorry, but that's just the way it is.
textByHash.610349da0e8dee5585ec8eccb18472ef96469ca5: A lot of our time is spent addressing everyday sorts of things, plus we meditate a lot and enhance our powers of mystical foresight.
textByHash.630b34dce4def50d784dd1b3f126b6d9c724152d: Well, let me think now...There's a copper eye, a rotating thing, and some pointy direction thingies. It's all highly scientific - and of course mystical - in a very magical 'foresight' sort of way.
textByHash.690b357df911055159788d4edb58119a8dacdf51: Well, that's not very nice...I mean, I'm a nice guy and I thought you were nice too! Why would you want to run me through? I mean, it's only a weather report.
textByHash.696f17059c53467b38a53fd210a5bc554db0dab1: How can you be sure? Are you so sure of what you just asked me? And am I really avoiding your questions by asking you lots of other questions? Answer me that huh!
textByHash.724d5ef4dac83703a13453ce56e8c10b54ec0022: Well, we use a special combination of items which are used to gauge current weather movements and we're able to predict future weather patterns from these. Of course, it's strongly linked to the Seers' foresight ability.
textByHash.8356b7fe3a277d257d5f548390d5876c301a9206: It's quite difficult to pinpoint exactly where she is, but apparently she's in some sort of cavern structure.
textByHash.8a72bccb2fee68ebaa50dce1e68182c6cdf81903: The girl's name is Petra, she's a very ...energetic youngster, always wanted to travel and have adventures. When she turned seventeen she set off to earn herself fame and fortune.
textByHash.9071fa9b0397e8da4b7e0b48034ab83dfa338587: Well, it's complicated, the special Seers tools that help us predict the weather are not aligned properly...
textByHash.91cca3022fd4ff463ea451b8ccad54d152b7f96e: Hmm, well, you can come back in several months and see if we can do one for you....does that help?
textByHash.95c88fc15dee3d79fbe054685d5e7b1e5a90b1c6: Oh, very well..but you'll need to be a specialist to fix this weather vane, it was made by some of the most experienced....
textByHash.9973039afd77d30dc0661a040ccf62ac466ba456: Don't go further east than you are already, no further south than Ardougne and no further west than the combat training camp.
textByHash.a6604fe8243ee6c29d8744b437535c4d3733d302: One might have intelligence enough to realise that cakes are bad for us, but we may not have the wisdom to stop cramming that delicious-looking fatty cream cake into our salivating mouth.
textByHash.a87e79f31eb09256c3c0752d08e6748e8e725df3: Hi there, yes she has actually! Well done, you're a true hero!
textByHash.a8b1bcab8b620d0ea36f33322a515a68c643bd2c: I would really like to, please believe me, I would, but I just can't.
textByHash.af79f6cceaca882c3bec075daf947327a0f5f475: Since when has any Seer ever given you a straight answer...the power of knowing the future and the visions we see have to be wrapped in allegory so that the truth can slowly be accepted by the listener.
textByHash.b0cf17633ca94ef40ad2174e6fa99996f2f33883: I can't help that, you should be more understanding and less forceful, then I might be persuaded to give you the weather report.
textByHash.b6d2457ed4e444ca8880bcd2b2a093a5846141e7: Why...how dare you...I've never been so insulted in my life.
textByHash.bc0bac866a15b9d53cb82369ada9537f3ae39e0b: Well, I wouldn't have put it quite that way...
textByHash.bc7b537e2659d0789c5b03c779d09b6d0b9861cc: Well, it would be nice to locate her...if possible. Then we may be able to work out what to do when we can see what sort of state she's in.
textByHash.ca885ecbae83fcae6510d758bdac5e3abff40e49: I knew you wouldn't help...oh well, perhaps someday you'll surprise me.
textByHash.ca9d336ceed771011a6c264ccb09dd21ee8c7e96: I wish I could but it's just been so difficult to get a clear image of the future at the moment. You know...we're all so relieved that Petra has returned and all that.
textByHash.d06d8666efd226cffa3fa594e77883da590577b2: Er...maybe...I may be talking about that...
textByHash.d375e1a6bd1e5516924a2f037b05262fd1b6db00: Do you think you could do me a small favour? Check around the vicinity. The impressions are coming from a south westerly direction.
textByHash.d441cf212e6a6c38c42d4871abc783f3beeaf1bf: Er...no. I can't, I told you, I can't get a clear picture. Nope, sorry, the conditions are just not quite right.
textByHash.d904b27d19ca0926ccc072ec4d7b6a0e85be6c50: There you go...a weather report as asked for...I hope it helps you!
textByHash.e024ce68ee03607bcd475db607ccff1a3edfb5e3: Well, that's a bit of a shame, I have to say...we all miss our Petra!
textByHash.e0bf1044e3e6f7eaa4c29328dd7d93fbc79e84ca: Thank you, all I need to do is figure out how to get these logs into that vial, but that's my problem. Take this as a reward.
textByHash.e6bff5010c5d0308eb01ce8719ccf476c2eef67a: This is Seers Village! We're an organisation of mystically gifted people with the power of foresight...we see things that have yet to come to pass.
textByHash.edf19c4892deb799032cd293e2ccb8d741140c2a: I'm not making you angry, you're doing all that on your own! I just don't have a weather report to give you!
textByHash.f549f6230b11a9f6b8ee433b7e154d10fea01fca: Alas my presumptuous friend, the power of foresight and the impulse to act is quite similar to the interplay between intelligence and wisdom.
textByHash.fb974e40ba03c43e297145cf5e8e654ec31ff563: Great! I just knew you'd agree to help!
